virtualCanvas._comment: Total virtual canvas size in virtual pixels.

windows._comment: window = where it appears on screen (OS logical pixels). source = which region of the virtual canvas this window samples (virtual pixels).
windows.label: Top display

_contentUrl_options: http://localhost:5173 = Vite dev server | http://localhost:5174 = alternate port
_spoutOutput_comment: Spout output — GPU texture sharing (Windows only). Requires SpoutLibrary.dll + SpoutLibrary.h in package/src/native/win/vendor/spout/ and a full rebuild.
_spoutInput_comment: Spout input receiver (Windows only). Frames are delivered to the browser via Win32 named shared memory.
